name: Lemon Carrots
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and peel carrots, then slice into 1/4-inch rounds.
2. Bring water to a boil in a saucepan.
3. Add carrots and salt to the boiling water. Cook until tender (10 to 15 minutes), covered.
4. Drain the carrots.
5. In the saucepan with melted butter, add the remaining ingredients.
6. Toss the carrots to coat them evenly.
7. Serve hot.
Food Exchanges per serving: 1 VEGETABLE EXCHANGE + 1 FAT EXCHANGE
CAL: 70
